verdict_reason: Tags on BG 2.22 are essence-vs-implementation, spec-vs-behavior, deprecation-management. essence-vs-implementation is the load-bearing tag — the simile IS the canonical essence-vs-implementation move. spec-vs-behavior is shared with 2.21, 2.23, 2.24, 2.25 and the doctrine is coherent across the block: the imperishable doctrine maps onto the contract/spec doctrine across all five verses. deprecation-management is the practical implication. The three tags together cover three distinct angles on the verse without redundancy. No cross_references[] declared. Score 8. PASS.
